summary: Re-validation of Fix3 (PaletteGrid filter row scroll/fade) and Fix4 (rename Mixer -> 'Criar Paleta' in Navbar desktop dropdown + MobileNav bottom + Navbar mobile drawer). All 4 sub-checks PASS. Fix1 and Fix2 untouched (regression not re-executed but source intact per files-of-reference).

validations_performed.fix3_desktop_palette_filters_fade_exists: PASS - data-testid=palette-filters-fade overlay found right after the row
validations_performed.fix3_desktop_scroll_smooth: PASS - inline style 'scroll-behavior: smooth' + class 'scroll-smooth' present, computed scroll-behavior=smooth
validations_performed.fix3_desktop_fade_linear_gradient: PASS - computed background contains linear-gradient(to left, rgba(250,247,242,0.95), rgba(250,247,242,0)); position:absolute; pointer-events:none
validations_performed.fix4_desktop_navbar_criar_dropdown: PASS - dropdown[data-testid=nav-dropdown-criar] shows links: Studio (/studio), 'Criar Paleta' (/mixer), Calculadora (/calculator). No item with literal text 'Mixer'.
validations_performed.fix4_mobile_drawer_mixer_label: PASS - mobile-menu drawer opened via mobile-menu-toggle shows under group 'Criar' the link [data-testid=mobile-nav-link-mixer] with text 'Criar Paleta'

critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx is 474 lines - within limit but trending heavy; consider splitting NavDropdown and Auth area into separate components if it grows further.

Desktop NavDropdown uses hover-only intent (mouseenter/mouseleave on parent div). Touch-screen laptops won't open it; click works only because the button has onClick toggling state. Recommended: add focus-within open trigger for keyboard accessibility (a11y).
PaletteGrid fade overlay uses hardcoded color rgba(250,247,242,0.95) (bone). If theme/background changes, fade will look wrong. Consider CSS var --bone-bg or Tailwind from-bone class for consistency.

MobileNav.jsx fade overlay uses rgba(255,255,255,...) while PaletteGrid uses rgba(250,247,242,...) - inconsistent background colors between two fades for same purpose. Pick one source-of-truth color (likely 'bone').
test_credentials: n/a - tests do not require auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 fully validated Fix3 (overflow-x auto + scroll-smooth + fade overlay with linear-gradient) and Fix4 (label 'Criar Paleta' replaces 'Mixer' in Navbar.jsx NAV_GROUPS.criar and visible in desktop dropdown, in mobile bottom nav, and in slide-out mobile drawer). Onboarding overlay [data-testid=onboarding-flow] still blocks home interactions until dismissed via [data-testid=onboarding-close-btn] (or 'COMEÇAR'); recommend dismissing programmatically in future tests. Desktop NavDropdown requires real Playwright locator.hover() (not page.mouse.move + click which loses hover); use page.locator('[data-testid=nav-group-criar]').hover().
rca of the issue: n/a (no issue found; both fixes validated)
